display.purpose: Dashboard numbers, KPI values, headline metrics.

body.purpose: Default text, descriptions, form labels, UI text.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Menus, dialogs, popovers — floating elements only.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state on interactive cards. Never on static surfaces.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover, focus, and state transitions. 150-250ms duration.

motion.name: instant
motion.purpose: No animation for state changes that should feel immediate (toggle, select).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button — Electric Blue, white text, 4px radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #019BE5; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0073A8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #019BE5; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0073A8; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #262626; color: #848592; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary/ghost button — Surface-2 background, tonal text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #262626; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #1A1A1A; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #019BE5; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action button — Signal Red, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #F20F0F; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #881106; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F20F0F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input — Surface-2 background, 4px radius, blue focus border.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #262626; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #AFB0B6; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #019BE5; outline: none; } .ds-input:disabled { color: #AFB0B6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default card on canvas — Surface background, 4px radius, no shadow.
components.html:
Threat report

Analysis summary text here.
components.css: .ds-card-surface { background: #141414; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px 20px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #FFFFFF; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-card-title::first-letter { text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: #848592; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Elevated Card
components.description: Card on a surface — Elevated background for secondary layering.
components.html: Nested content on a surface card.
components.css: .ds-card-elevated { background: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px 20px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: #848592; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Status chip — Surface-2 background, muted text, lowercase voice.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #262626; color: #848592; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 12px; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; text-transform: lowercase; } .ds-chip::first-letter { text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Sidebar nav item — Canvas background, active state with Electric Blue accent.
components.html: DashboardAnalysesObservations
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; background: #0A0A0A; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; font-family: Peyda, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: #848592; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #1A1A1A; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-nav-active { background: #262626; color: #019BE5; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-active::first-letter { text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview:
ArmanCTI is a cyber threat intelligence platform built for security analysts who need precision, density, and speed. The interface feels like a professional instrument — a dark control panel where every pixel earns its place. The black canvas is the housing; tonal greys create depth without shadows; accent colors appear surgically, never decoratively.

The system rejects the SaaS aesthetic entirely. No cream backgrounds, no card shadows, no gradient hero metrics, no emoji icons. The departure from default OpenCTI cyan/teal is intentional — Electric Blue replaces it as the single primary accent, used on ≤15% of any screen. Violet marks AI features exclusively. The grey scale carries 85%+ of visual weight.

Typography uses a single family — Peyda — across all roles. Weight and size create hierarchy, not font pairing. The signature voice pattern is lowercase with first-letter uppercase on headings, chips, tabs, and tooltips.
keyCharacteristics: Black canvas (#0A0A0A) as the dominant surface; tonal layering for depth
Surgical accent usage (≤15% of screen); grey scale carries the rest
4px border radius throughout — sharp, precise, not soft
Flat by default; shadows only on floating elements and state responses
Dual theme support (dark default, light available) via CSS variables

rules.name: The Surgical Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent colors appear on ≤15% of any screen. The black canvas and grey scale carry 85%+ of visual weight. If an accent feels decorative, remove it.

rules.name: The No-Teal Rule
rules.body: Original OpenCTI cyan/teal palette is prohibited. Electric Blue (#019BE5) is the replacement. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Gradient Border Rule
rules.body: Gradient borders (blue→purple) are reserved for premium feature actions and AI elements only. Never on standard UI.

rules.name: The One-Font Rule
rules.body: Peyda is the only family. No Geologica, no IBM Plex Sans, no third family. Weight and size create hierarchy; font pairing does not.

rules.name: The Lowercase Voice Rule
rules.body: text-transform: lowercase with &::first-letter { text-transform: uppercase } on headings, chips, tabs, and tooltips. This is the signature voice pattern — not optional.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on static cards or surfaces. Use the tonal scale (--ravin-bg → --ravin-surface → --ravin-elevated → --ravin-surface-2) for depth.

rules.name: The No-Card-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards convey depth through background color, not shadows. A card on canvas is #141414; a card on a surface is #1A1A1A. That's the entire elevation system.

dos: Do use the tonal grey scale (#0A0A0A → #141414 → #1A1A1A → #262626) for all depth and layering.
Do keep accent colors to ≤15% of any screen. The grey scale is the system.
Do use Peyda as the single font family. Weight creates hierarchy.
Do apply the lowercase voice pattern (text-transform: lowercase + &::first-letter { text-transform: uppercase }) on headings, chips, tabs, and tooltips.
Do use 4px border radius everywhere. Sharp, precise, not soft.
Do use Electric Blue (#019BE5) for primary actions and focus states only.
Do use Violet (#860EFE) for AI features exclusively.
Do support both dark (default) and light themes via the --ravin-* CSS variables.
donts: Don't use the original OpenCTI cyan/teal palette. The departure is intentional.
Don't add box-shadows to static cards or surfaces. Tonal layering is the elevation system.
Don't use Geologica or IBM Plex Sans. Peyda is the only family.
Don't use cream, sand, beige, or any warm-neutral background. The canvas is black (#0A0A0A).
Don't use cookie-cutter card grids, hero-metric templates, or emoji icons — this is a professional instrument, not a SaaS product.
Don't use purple gradients everywhere, glassmorphism, or "powered by AI" badges.
Don't use gradient borders (blue→purple) outside of premium feature actions and AI elements.
Don't introduce a third font family. Weight and size create hierarchy, not font pairing.
